title: ornus strigata
intro: Ornus strigata, also known as the bitter buckthorn or columnar buckthorn, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Ornus strigata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the liver's detoxification process, making it a popular herbal remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Ornus strigata typically involve drying the plant's leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to promote overall well-being.
